Since 1983, Villa Parravicini Revel has been hosting events on Lake Como with the art of hospitality. Located in the heart of Como, only 40 minutes from Milan and 30 minutes from Malpensa airport, the villa combines historic charm with a strategic location. Its spacious salons provide an elegant setting for weddings, gala dinners, and exclusive celebrations.
